parsedBody.response:
Based on the data from a past query, the top result in the Sports category for Kalshi (by volume) is a multi-event parlay. Below is a cross-reference of that market with related odds currently available on Polymarket.

### Top Kalshi Sports Market
| Attribute | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Title** | yes Stuttgart, yes Brighton, yes Fulham, yes Manchester United, yes Atalanta, no Over 3.5 goals, no Over 4.5 goals |
| **Ticker** | KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-S20263CF0A3EA79F-7BCF85ED849 |
| **Yes Price** | 0¢ |
| **No Price** | 100¢ |
| **24h Volume** | $0 |

### Polymarket Cross-Reference (EPL & Football Markets)
While Polymarket does not have an identical multi-event parlay, here are the current odds for the individual leagues and teams mentioned in the Kalshi top result:

| Polymarket Event/Question | Yes Price (Odds) | Volume |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Will Arsenal finish in the top 4 of the EPL 2025–26? | $0.98 | $8,007.39 |
| Will Brentford win the 2025–26 English Premier League? | $0.00 | $14,143,548.71 |
| Will Liverpool finish in 2nd place in the 2025-26 EPL? | $0.01 | $63,474.97 |
| Will Chelsea finish in 3rd place in the 2025-26 EPL? | $0.10 | $2,588.17 |
| Will Tottenham finish in last place in the 2025-26 EPL? | $0.02 | $4,856.19 |
| Will Wrexham AFC win the 2025-2026 FA Cup? | $0.01 | $272.47 |

*Note: The Kalshi market's 0¢ Yes price suggest the outcome is considered mathematically impossible or the market is currently inactive, whereas Polymarket maintains highly active individual team season-long outcomes.*

kalshiTopMarket.title: yes Stuttgart,yes Brighton,yes Fulham,yes Manchester United,yes Atalanta,no Over 3.5 goals scored,no Over 4.5 goals scored

polymarketMatches.title: English Premier League - Top 4 Finish
polymarketMatches.question: Will Arsenal finish in the top 4 of the EPL 2025–26 standings?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket to predict which clubs finish in the top 4 of the English Premier League standings for the 2025–26 season.

If the listed club officially finishes in the top 4 of the English Premier League standings at the end of the season, the market will resolve to "Yes." Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If two or more clubs are tied on points for a top 4 position, resolution will follow the official English Premier League tiebreaking procedures.

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed before October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "No."

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League - Top 4 Finish " occurs
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League - Top 4 Finish " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: Carabao Cup Winner
polymarketMatches.question: Will Team C win the 2025–26 Carabao Cup?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket to predict which club will win the 2025–26 Carabao Cup.

If the listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 Carabao Cup, this market will resolve to "Yes." Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the 2025–26 Carabao Cup is canceled or not completed by June 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other."

The primary resolution source for this market will be official results published by the Carabao Cup / EFL Cup (https://www.efl.com/competitions/carabao-cup/). A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The event described in "Carabao Cup Winner " occurs
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "Carabao Cup Winner " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: English Premier League Winner
polymarketMatches.question: Will Brentford win the 2025–26 English Premier League?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket on whether the listed club will win the 2025–26 English Premier League.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 English Premier League. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to win the league (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 English Premier League
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League Winner " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: English Premier League – 2nd Place
polymarketMatches.question: Will Liverpool finish in 2nd place in the 2025-26 English Premier League?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket on whether the listed club will finish in 2nd place in the 2025–26 English Premier League.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club finishes 2nd in the final standings of the 2025–26 English Premier League. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to finish 2nd in the 2025-26 EPL season (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The listed club finishes 2nd in the final standings of the 2025–26 English Premier League
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League – 2nd Place " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: English Premier League – Last Place
polymarketMatches.question: Will Tottenham finish in last place in the 2025-26 English Premier League?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket on whether the listed club will finish in last place in the 2025–26 English Premier League.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club finishes in last place in the final standings of the 2025–26 English Premier League. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to finish in  last place in the 2025-26 EPL season (e.g. they are mathematically unable to), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The listed club finishes in last place in the final standings of the 2025–26 English Premier League
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League – Last Place " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: English Premier League – 3rd Place
polymarketMatches.question: Will Chelsea finish in 3rd place in the 2025-26 English Premier League?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket on whether the listed club will finish in 3rd place in the 2025–26 English Premier League.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club finishes 3rd in the final standings of the 2025–26 English Premier League. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to finish 3rd in the 2025-26 EPL season (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The listed club finishes 3rd in the final standings of the 2025–26 English Premier League
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League – 3rd Place " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: 2025-2026 FA Cup Winner
polymarketMatches.question: Will Wrexham AFC win the 2025-2026 FA Cup?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2025-2026 FA Cup. 

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2025-2026 FA Cup per the rules of the tournament (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2025-2026 FA Cup is cancelled, postponed after June 30, 2026 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Football Association (https://www.thefa.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The event described in "2025-2026 FA Cup Winner" occurs
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "2025-2026 FA Cup Winner" does NOT occur

data.note: Comparison requires verifying that 'YES' outcomes represent the same resolution criteria on both platforms.
